name: POLICY-1
title: CLAUDE.md has stale @include for workflow-rules.md which no longer exists
description: CLAUDE.md contains the directive '@.claude/features/policy/workflow-rules.md' in its @-include block, but the file .claude/features/policy/workflow-rules.md has been deleted. This causes the open-message context block to reference a missing file. Reproduction: run 'ls .claude/features/policy/workflow-rules.md' — file not found; check CLAUDE.md @-includes — directive still present.
